data.name: About_MITLicenseWarning
data.value: This software is distributed under the MIT License and is completely free and open-source. Any solicitation of payment is unauthorized — please beware of scams.

data.name: App_AlreadyRunningMessage
data.value: Another instance of A_Pair is already running. To avoid data conflicts, this instance will exit automatically.

data.name: Common_TimeoutFormat
data.value: "{0}" did not complete within {1} seconds and was cancelled.\nSome data may not have been written. Please try again.

data.name: Guide_Seating_Select_Desc
data.value: Select a venue and member dataset to generate seating

data.name: Member_DeleteConfirmMsg
data.value: Delete dataset "{0}"? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Member_EmptyHint
data.value: Click Import or load a saved dataset

data.name: Member_FrontRowTooltip
data.value: Needs front row seat (e.g. vision needs)

data.name: Member_GenderTooltip
data.value: Gender: Male, Female, or Other. Blank for unknown.

data.name: Member_HeightTooltip
data.value: Height in cm, e.g. 170.5. Blank for unknown.

data.name: Member_NameTooltip
data.value: Required. Member name, cannot be empty.

data.name: Member_NewRowPendingMsg
data.value: The new row has incomplete data. Saving will discard these inputs.

data.name: Member_NoValidMembers
data.value: No valid data found in file. Check the file format.

data.name: Member_UnsavedChangesMsg
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Save before switching?

data.name: Freeform_NoDataHint
data.value: Download a CSV template, edit it, then import or load a saved layout

data.name: Freeform_ReadyHint
data.value: Ready. Import freeform data or select a layout

data.name: Freeform_UnloadedHint
data.value: Unloaded. Import data or select a layout

data.name: Home_Hint
data.value: Click a sidebar item to get started

data.name: Plugin_NoPlugins
data.value: No plugins found Place plugins in the Plugins directory

data.name: Plugin_SelectHint
data.value: Select a plugin from the list

data.name: Seating_CanvasHint
data.value: Drag to pan, scroll to zoom

data.name: Seating_NotGeneratedHint
data.value: Select a venue and member set from the left panel, then click Generate

data.name: Seating_ReadyHint
data.value: Ready. Select a venue and member set to generate seating

data.name: Seating_SelectTarget
data.value: Selected "{0}", click target seat to swap

data.name: Seating_SelectTargetFmt
data.value: Selected "{0}", click target seat to swap

data.name: Seating_UnsavedChangesMsg
data.value: There are unsaved changes. Save before leaving?

data.name: Seating_UnsupportedExportMsg
data.value: Freeform layout does not support tabular export. Use Preview Image instead.

data.name: Settings_LangChangedMessage
data.value: The interface language has been changed. Restart the application for the change to take effect.

data.name: Settings_LoadFailed
data.value: Failed to load settings, using defaults

data.name: Settings_ResetConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to restore all settings to their defaults?

data.name: Snapshot_BatchDeleteMsg
data.value: Delete {0} selected snapshots? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Snapshot_BatchDeleteMsgFmt
data.value: Delete {0} selected snapshots? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Snapshot_DataChangedMsg
data.value: Some people have been removed from the member set.

data.name: Snapshot_NoWorkspace
data.value: No active workspace. Generate seating first.

data.name: Snapshot_RollbackMsg
data.value: Rollback to snapshot from {0}? Current seating will be overwritten.

data.name: Snapshot_RollbackMsgFmt
data.value: Rollback to snapshot from {0}? Current seating will be overwritten.

data.name: Snapshot_SelectHint
data.value: Select a snapshot to view details

data.name: Snapshot_VenueChanged
data.value: The venue layout has changed since this snapshot was created.

data.name: Snapshot_VenueChangedWarning
data.value: Venue layout changed, rollback may fail

data.name: Snapshot_VenueDeletedMsg
data.value: The venue file linked to this snapshot has been deleted.

data.name: Strategy_DuplicateWarningFmt
data.value:
These conflicts will occur after saving:
{0}

data.name: Strategy_ConfigInvalidHint
data.value: ⚠ Venue or roster changes may invalidate current strategy settings. Please review before execution.

data.name: Strategy_SaveBlockFailed
data.value: Auto-save of code block config failed, please save manually before leaving

data.name: Strategy_SelectHint
data.value: Select a strategy to view and edit

data.name: Strategy_SelectHint2
data.value: Select a strategy from the list

data.name: Strategy_UnsavedChangesMsg
data.value: Unsaved strategy changes. Save before leaving?

data.name: Venue_AddDoorTooltip
data.value: Add a door to the preview

data.name: Venue_ColumnAisles
data.value: Column aisles (click to insert between columns):

data.name: Venue_DeleteConfirmMsgFmt
data.value: Delete venue "{0}"? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Venue_FreeformHint
data.value: Freeform layout defines seats via CSV/JSON coordinates.

data.name: Venue_HasPodiumTooltip
data.value: Show a podium at the front of the classroom.

data.name: Venue_OriginXTooltip
data.value: Starting X position of first column (px), 0-2000.

data.name: Venue_OriginYTooltip
data.value: Starting Y position of first row (px), 0-2000.

data.name: Venue_PolarFrontRowsTooltip
data.value: Number of outer rings treated as front rows.

data.name: Venue_RingAislePositionsTooltip
data.value: Comma-separated ring numbers to insert aisles after.

data.name: Venue_RowAisles
data.value: Row aisles (click to insert between rows):

data.name: Venue_SeatsPerRingTooltip
data.value: Seats per ring in uniform mode.

data.name: Venue_SelectHint
data.value: Select a venue or create a new one

data.name: Watchdog_MessageFmt
data.value: UI thread unresponsive for {0}s. Application will exit. Diagnostics saved to: {1}

data.name: Startup_DotNetVersion
data.value: .NET runtime version {0} detected. .NET 10.0 or higher is recommended.

data.name: Startup_UnsupportedOS
data.value: The current operating system {0} has not been fully tested and may have compatibility issues.

data.name: Snapshot_VenueImportMsg
data.value: The venue has been modified. Import venue config from snapshot as a new venue?

data.name: Snapshot_VenueRestoreMsg
data.value: The venue has been deleted. Restore venue config from snapshot?

data.name: Guide_Phase0_Step0_Desc
data.value: A_Pair is a smart seating arrangement tool. This guide will walk you through your first seating plan: import student data → create a venue layout → configure strategies → generate seating → export results. Estimated time: 3-5 minutes.

data.name: Guide_Phase0_Step1_Desc
data.value: The left sidebar contains all feature entries. Pages will switch automatically during the guide — just follow along. You can also click × at any time to exit.

data.name: Guide_Phase1_Step0_Desc
data.value: First, import your student data. Click the Import button — CSV and Excel formats are supported. You can also download a template first.

data.name: Guide_Phase1_Step1_Desc
data.value: After importing, student data appears in this list. You can manually edit, add, or remove students. Use the new row at the bottom to add entries.

data.name: Guide_Phase2_Step0_Desc
data.value: Now create a seating layout for your classroom or exam hall. Click New Venue to begin.

data.name: Guide_Phase2_Step1_Desc
data.value: Choose a layout type (usually Grid), then set rows and columns to define the seating arrangement. The preview on the right updates in real time.

data.name: Guide_Phase2_Step2_Desc
data.value: Click Save when done. You can create multiple venues (e.g., different classrooms) and choose which one to use when generating seating.

data.name: Guide_Phase3_Step0_Desc
data.value: Select and configure seating strategies. Strategies are ordered by priority (higher = earlier assignment).

data.name: Guide_Phase3_Step1_Desc
data.value: Click a strategy to view and modify its parameters. Use the toggle to enable/disable strategies. We recommend keeping the defaults for first-time use — just click Save All.

data.name: Guide_Phase4_Step0_Desc
data.value: Choose a student dataset and venue layout in the left panel. These are required before generating seating.

data.name: Guide_Phase4_Step1_Desc
data.value: Click the Generate button to automatically arrange seats according to your configured strategies. You can then view and manually adjust seats on the central canvas.

data.name: Guide_Phase4_Step2_Desc
data.value: Export the seating chart to Excel, CSV, PDF, or image formats. You can also save it as a snapshot for future reference.

data.name: Guide_Phase5_Step0_Desc
data.value: You now know the core workflow of A_Pair. You can start creating seating arrangements on your own! Refer to the documentation if you need help.

data.name: Guide_Welcome_Greeting_Desc
data.value: A_Pair is a smart seating arrangement tool. This guide will walk you through your first seating plan: import student data → create a venue layout → configure strategies → generate seating → export results. Estimated time: 3–5 minutes.

data.name: Guide_Welcome_Navigation_Desc
data.value: This is the navigation sidebar. Pages switch automatically during the guide — just follow along. Click × at any time to exit.

data.name: Guide_Members_Import_Desc
data.value: Click this button to import student data from a CSV or Excel file. You can also download a template first.

data.name: Guide_Members_Manage_Desc
data.value: Imported students appear here. Click any cell to edit, or click the delete button on each row to remove a student.

data.name: Guide_Members_AddStudent_Desc
data.value: This is the add-new-student row. Fill in name, height, gender and click + to add a student to the list.

data.name: Guide_Venue_New_Title
data.value: Click here to create a venue

data.name: Guide_Venue_New_Desc
data.value: Create a seating layout for your classroom or exam hall. Click this button to start.

data.name: Guide_Venue_Layout_Desc
data.value: Select a layout type (usually Grid), then set rows and columns. The preview updates in real time.

data.name: Guide_Venue_Save_Title
data.value: Click here to save the venue

data.name: Guide_Venue_Save_Desc
data.value: Click Save when done. You can create multiple venues and select which one to use for seating.

data.name: Guide_Strategy_List_Title
data.value: Select a strategy from this list

data.name: Guide_Strategy_List_Desc
data.value: Click a strategy to view its details. Strategies are ordered by priority (higher = earlier assignment).

data.name: Guide_Strategy_Adjust_Desc
data.value: After selecting a strategy, toggle this switch to enable or disable it. Adjust parameters in the right panel.

data.name: Guide_Strategy_Conflict_Title
data.value: Enable as Needed — Conflicts May Occur

data.name: Guide_Strategy_Conflict_Desc
data.value: Multiple strategies may interfere or conflict when enabled together. Choose combinations based on your needs. Higher priority strategies execute first. The default configuration suits most classrooms.

data.name: Guide_Strategy_SaveAll_Title
data.value: Click here to save all strategies

data.name: Guide_Strategy_SaveAll_Desc
data.value: After configuring strategies, click Save All to apply changes. Keep defaults for first-time use.

data.name: Guide_Seating_SelectVenue_Desc
data.value: Pick a venue from the list. This is required before generating a seating plan.

data.name: Guide_Seating_SelectDataset_Desc
data.value: Pick the student dataset to assign seats to. Once both venue and dataset are selected, you can generate.

data.name: Guide_Seating_Generate_Desc
data.value: Click this button after selecting a venue and dataset. The system arranges seats based on your strategies.

data.name: Guide_Seating_Export_Desc
data.value: After generating seating, click here to export as Excel, CSV, PDF, or image format.

data.name: Guide_Snapshot_SelectVenue_Title
data.value: Select a venue from this dropdown

data.name: Guide_Snapshot_SelectVenue_Desc
data.value: First pick a venue from this dropdown. The list below will show all saved seating snapshots for that venue.

data.name: Guide_Snapshot_Browse_Desc
data.value: Every generated seating plan is auto-saved. Click a snapshot to preview it, then use Rollback to restore.

data.name: Guide_Closing_Finish_Desc
data.value: You've completed the A_Pair core workflow guide. You're ready to create seating arrangements on your own! Check documentation if needed.

data.name: Guide_Freeform_Import_Desc
data.value: Import seat coordinates from a CSV or JSON file. The file should include X, Y positions and row/column groupings.

data.name: Guide_Freeform_AddPoint_Title
data.value: Click here to add a point manually

data.name: Guide_Freeform_AddPoint_Desc
data.value: Add seat coordinates manually. Enter X, Y position and row/column, then click this button.

data.name: Guide_Freeform_Save_Title
data.value: Click here to save the layout

data.name: Guide_Freeform_Save_Desc
data.value: After editing the freeform layout, click this button to save. Saved layouts can be used in the seating page.

data.name: Guide_Plugin_List_Desc
data.value: Installed plugins appear here. Click a plugin to view details, configuration, and script editor.

data.name: Guide_Plugin_Enable_Desc
data.value: After selecting a plugin, toggle this switch to enable or disable it in the seating strategy pipeline.

data.name: Seating_CreateEmptyHint
data.value: Load seat layout without auto-assigning students

data.name: Seating_TrashHint
data.value: Drag or click to remove student (select occupied seat first)

data.name: Guide_CloseConfirm_Message
data.value: Exit the onboarding guide? You can restart it anytime from Settings.
